query:
-- Link Muhammad Azim Ali to team 150001
UPDATE agent_crm_profiles
SET teamId = 150001
WHERE id = 360001 AND userId = 9690367;

-- Mark the team invite as accepted
UPDATE team_invites
SET status = 'accepted',
    acceptedAt = NOW(),
    acceptedByUserId = 9690367
WHERE id = 1 AND teamId = 150001 AND invitedEmail = 'abusufyan511308@gmail.com';

-- Verify both members are now on the team
SELECT acp.id, acp.userId, u.name, u.email, acp.membershipTier, acp.teamId, acp.agentStatus
FROM agent_crm_profiles acp
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = acp.userId
WHERE acp.teamId = 150001;
